title: Extra Large Binder Clips 2 inch Jumbo Binder Clips 24 Pack Big Metal Paper Clamps Black (2 Inch)

Widely Used: Our clips are quickly and temporarily bind stacks of loose papers.And keep all foods air closed.
Reusable: Our clips could be reusable and easily removed with a pInch of the arms for full access to documents at any time.

description: 24 Packs of Extra Large Binder Clips Feature: Color: Black Clamp & Silver Handle Quantity: 24 Packs of Extra Large Binder Clips packed in 2 boxs.
